review_questions: Does the candidate preserve natural language as the primary semantic authority while using inventory only as verification skeleton?
Are element rows atomic and broad enough to cover pages, states, commands, inputs, navigation, messages, roles, permissions, overlays, and other UI elements?
Are missing elements completed by deductive strategy first and blocked when completion would add product capability?
Are page-only or flow-only missing child surfaces routed through structural completion review and product expansion gaps when required?
Does the candidate avoid locks, repository code, P1/P2 mutation, earlier P3 candidate mutation, and root P3 phase-file mutation?
